items.title: Proton e.MAS 7 Premium Plus Launched at KLIMS 2026
items.summary: New flagship variant with 68.39 kWh battery, 450 km range, massage seats, front passenger leg rest. Priced at RM125,800 before rebate.

items.title: MG S5 EV CKD Launched — More Power, Lower Price
items.summary: Locally assembled at Melaka. Upgraded 205 PS motor, 350 Nm torque, 446 km range. Priced at RM117,528 — undercuts CBU version by RM11k.

items.title: Leapmotor B10 Gets Up to RM18,000 Rebate; C10 Plus Up to RM13,000 Savings
items.summary: B10 Life at RM99,800 after RM8k rebate. B10 Design at RM109,800 after RM9k rebate. C10 Plus at RM139,000 after RM9k rebate + RM4k insurance subsidy.

items.title: Leapmotor C10 Plus Launched with 800V Architecture
items.summary: 81.9 kWh battery, 510 km range, 180 kW DC charging. 299 PS motor. Priced from RM148,000. New Night Edition at RM156,000.

items.title: Jetour T2 i-DM PHEV Open for Booking
items.summary: PHEV version of T2 with 1.5T + dual motors, 360 PS, 100 km EV range, 1,200 km combined range. Estimated price RM168,888.

items.title: Jaecoo J5 EV Teased for Malaysia — 399 km Range, RM108k Estimated
items.summary: Full BEV with 61.1 kWh LFP battery, 130 kW DC charging, pet-friendly interior. Expected launch Q3 2026.

items.title: Omoda C9 PHEV Launched — 537 HP, RM208,800
items.summary: Tri-motor AWD PHEV with 34.46 kWh battery, 169 km EV range, 4.9s 0-100 km/h. 70 kW DC charging.

items.title: Proton e.MAS 5 Launched — From RM56,800 After Rebate
items.summary: Entry-level BEV hatchback. 30.12 kWh (225 km) and 40.16 kWh (325 km) variants. Free 7kW home charger + RM1k trade-in bonus.

items.title: MG4 EV Price Drop — Up to RM28,741 Reduction
items.summary: MG4 Lux now RM100,888 (down from RM129,629). Lux ER RM128,888. XPower RM138,888. Aggressive pricing to compete with BYD Atto 3 and Proton e.MAS 7.

items.title: Leapmotor B10 Launched — C-Segment EV SUV from RM107,800
items.summary: Two variants: Life (56.2 kWh, 361 km) and Design (67.1 kWh, 434 km). 11 kW AC charging standard. 140-168 kW DC charging.

items.title: Chery Tiggo 7 & 8 PHEV CNY Promos — Up to RM6,888 Rebate
items.summary: Tiggo 7 PHEV from RM109,800. Tiggo 8 PHEV from RM138,800. Both with combined 1,200 km range, 90 km EV range.

items.title: Leapmotor C10 Price Cut — RM125,000 (Down RM34,000 from Launch)
items.summary: Added 11 kW AC charging. Price reduced from RM159,000 to RM125,000. CKD at Stellantis Gurun plant.

items.title: EV Market Update: Malaysia EV Adoption Accelerating
items.summary: Over 20 full EV models now available in Malaysia under RM200k. Price competition intensifying between Proton, BYD, MG, Chery, and Leapmotor. Government EV incentives continue with tax exemptions.

items.title: Tesla Model 3 Standard RWD Launched — RM147,600, Most Affordable Tesla
items.summary: Entry-level Model 3 with 62.5 kWh LFP battery, 534 km WLTP range, 170 kW DC charging. New EV Switcher Programme offers up to RM7,500 trade-in uplift.

items.title: Tesla Model 3 & Model Y Get OTA Range Boost — Up to 55 km Extra
items.summary: Over-the-air update increases WLTP range across all variants. Model 3 Long Range RWD now achieves 750 km. Model Y Long Range RWD gets 691 km.

items.title: Tesla Model Y Juniper Facelift — Now Up to 691 km Range
items.summary: Updated Model Y with 691 km Long Range RWD variant, 629 km Long Range AWD. New 6-seater L Premium variant at RM260,000. Prices maintained despite tax changes.

items.title: BYD Atto 3 vs MG4 vs Proton e.MAS 7 — Segment Comparison
items.summary: Three top contenders in C-segment EV under RM150k. Atto 3 starts at RM132,729, MG4 Lux at RM100,888, e.MAS 7 Prime at RM96,800 after rebate. Each offers different strengths in range, power, and features.

items.title: BYD M6 Extended — Best Value EV MPV at RM130,729
items.summary: 71.8 kWh battery, 530 km range, 7-seater. Monthly from RM1,234 after rebate. Only EV MPV in Malaysia under RM150k.

items.title: MG S5 EV CKD vs CBU — What's Different?
items.summary: CKD version has upgraded motor (205 PS vs 170 PS), +100 Nm torque, more range (446 km vs 425 km), full leatherette seats, power passenger seat, hands-free tailgate — all at RM117,528 vs CBU Lux at RM128,548.

items.title: Omoda Jaecoo Malaysia: Up to RM18,888 Rebates Across SUV Range
items.summary: J7 PHEV gets RM10k cash rebate (July Mega Promo). Omoda C9 PHEV launched with RM3k rebate + free insurance. 6 new models planned for 2026.

items.title: Jaecoo J5 ICE Launched at RM108k — EV Version Coming
items.summary: Petrol J5 launched with pet-friendly interior. Full BEV version teased for Q3 2026 with 61.1 kWh battery, 399 km range.

items.title: Jetour T2 Buyer's Guide — Everything You Need to Know
items.summary: Boxy off-road SUV with 2.0T engine, 245 PS, XWD AWD. RM157,669. PHEV i-DM version open for booking. Warranty: 7yr vehicle + 10yr powertrain.

items.title: Leapmotor A10 (B03X) — Next New Model for Malaysia
items.summary: B-segment EV SUV expected end 2026 or Q1 2027. Will compete with Atto 2 and e.MAS 5. CKD at Gurun.

items.title: Chery OMODA E5 at RM99,800 — Cheapest C-Segment EV SUV?
items.summary: 61 kWh battery, 430 km range, 150 kW motor, 80 kW DC charging. Promo price for 2025 stock. Free home wallbox. Undercuts most competitors on price-per-range ratio.
